method: live production probes + source code read + task-orchestrator log inspection

githubTokenStatus.impact: Blocks commit, push, and the senior-developer git-deploy operator. The worker can read the repo anonymously (HTTP 200) but cannot push.

workerEndpointsLive.GET /api/ivx/senior-developer/worker/led: 200, 0 entries (ledger empty on this boot — diskless restart)

workerJobs.honestAssessment: Read-only inspection. No commit, no push, no deploy. Health check passed. This is a genuine local-only verification.

workerJobs.goal: [TEMPLATE_MODE:NEW_FEATURE] Act as the IVX self-hosted senior developer worker...
workerJobs.honestAssessment: Template-mode feature request. No files changed, no commit, no deploy. Marked COMPLETE because health check passed — but no real engineering work was shipped.

taskOrchestrator.rootCause: The task-orchestrator store blocks.json uses hardcoded commitHash='abc1234' and codeChanges='edited a file' for EVERY block. deploymentStatus is null for all 32 tasks. The orchestrator never executed a real git commit or deploy — it only recorded synthetic 'completed' blocks. Production deploys that DID happen (dep-d96pr34kgmds73a9cudg at commit 79c5b3cf) came from MANUAL Render triggers in chat, NOT from the orchestrator.
taskOrchestrator.fakeEvidenceFound: block.commitHash='abc1234' (placeholder, not a real SHA), block.codeChanges='edited a file' (generic, not a real diff), block.deploymentStatus=null for all

repo_read.evidence: GitHub repo accessible anonymously HTTP 200; worker status endpoint reports githubRepoReadWrite=true

file_write.evidence: Runtime applies safe patches to allowlisted paths (backend/, expo/)

test_run.evidence: Worker jobs report testsPassed=true; import-smoke validation in node-only container

git_commit.evidence: GitHub token returns 401 — cannot authenticate to GitHub API for commit

render_deploy.evidence: Render API key valid; latest deploy dep-d96pr34kgmds73a9cudg live at 79c5b3cf

supabase_check.evidence: Service role key present, owner login mints real JWT

blockers.name: GITHUB_TOKEN dead/revoked
blockers.impact: git_commit + git_push capabilities are blocked. The senior-developer worker CANNOT commit or push code to GitHub. This is why all 32 task-orchestrator tasks have deploymentStatus=null and no real commit SHA.
blockers.fix: Generate a new GitHub Personal Access Token (classic) with repo scope, or a fine-grained token with Contents:write on ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest. Save it to Render environment variables as GITHUB_TOKEN and trigger a redeploy.

blockers.name: Task orchestrator uses placeholder evidence
blockers.liveProof: blocks.json: commitHash='abc1234', codeChanges='edited a file', deploymentStatus=null for all 32 tasks
blockers.impact: The task orchestrator reports tasks as 'completed' but never actually commits or deploys. The 'completed' status is based on synthetic block records, not real git/Render operations.
blockers.fix: Either wire the task orchestrator to the real senior-developer worker (enqueueSeniorDeveloperJob), or remove the fake 'completed' status and mark tasks as 'local_only' until a real commit SHA exists.

blockers.name: Proof ledger empty after diskless restart
blockers.liveProof: GET /worker/ledger => 0 entries (Render diskless restart wiped in-memory ledger; GitHub side-branch ledger write failed because GITHUB_TOKEN is dead)
blockers.impact: Past worker job proofs are lost on every Render redeploy. The ledger is not durable.
blockers.fix: Fix GITHUB_TOKEN so the GitHub side-branch ledger persistence works, OR configure the durable Supabase store.

blockers.name: GITHUB_REPO_URL malformed in .env
blockers.liveProof: expo/.env line 11: GITHUB_REPO_URL=gh repo clone ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest (not a valid URL)
blockers.impact: parseGithubRepoUrl regex may fail to extract owner/repo from this value

isIvxSeniorDeveloperReal.verdict: PARTIALLY REAL — read/inspect/test/health/verify capabilities work live. Commit/push/deploy-end-to-end is BLOCKED by dead GitHub token.
isIvxSeniorDeveloperReal.whatWorks: Owner login, repo read, file read, patch proposal, test/import-smoke, Render deploy trigger, health check, version verify, production verify, autonomous-mode classification, owner policy gate, approval gate, worker queue
isIvxSeniorDeveloperReal.whatDoesNotWork: git_commit, git_push (GITHUB_TOKEN 401). Therefore no task-orchestrator task has ever shipped a real commit. All production deploys came from manual Render triggers or Rork-managed git pushes, not the autonomous senior developer.
isIvxSeniorDeveloperReal.whatIsFake: The task-orchestrator blocks.json uses commitHash='abc1234' and codeChanges='edited a file' as placeholders. deploymentStatus=null for all 32 tasks. The orchestrator marks tasks 'completed' without a real commit or deploy.
